column1: CREATE TABLE accounts (id text, role text, created_at timestamp with time zone, password text, username text);
CREATE TABLE bookings (PHONE numeric, STATUS text, created_at timestamp with time zone, ADDRESS text, NAME text, billing amount bigint, id bigint);
CREATE TABLE couriers (id text, data jsonb, created_at timestamp with time zone);
CREATE TABLE credits (created_at timestamp with time zone, data jsonb, id text);
CREATE TABLE rates (data jsonb, created_at timestamp with time zone, id text);
CREATE TABLE sessions (created_at timestamp with time zone, token text, account_id text, expires_at timestamp with time zone);
CREATE TABLE shipment_modes (id integer, name text);
CREATE TABLE shipments (pod text, status text, id text, created_at timestamp with time zone, data jsonb);
CREATE TABLE statuses (id integer, name text);
